mentions.note: Compared unfavorably to Verizon by caller; Cramer prefers Verizon as better positioned.
Provides income but no growth. If seeking dividend + growth combo, Cramer prefers master limited partnerships like Enterprise Products (EPD) or WANO over AT&T.
Caller discussed EchoStar spectrum deal ($23B for 50 MHz 5G expansion). Cramer concerned about Starlink and Amazon LEO satellite competition eroding rural advantage; not interested.
